tournament.name: MTG SEA Championship Final 2025-26 Round 3 - Oracle Events

decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures and spells to pressure the opponent and control the board. By utilizing efficient damage spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, along with card draw and creature recursion from cards like Opt and Drake Hatcher, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent. With a mix of burn spells, tempo plays, and creature aggression, this UR Aggro deck seeks to establish an early advantage and maintain pressure until victory is achieved.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using a combination of efficient creatures and direct damage spells. By utilizing the aggressive nature of the UR Aggro archetype, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize. Utilizing cards like Burst Lightning, Opt, and Stormchaser's Talent allows for consistent damage output, while creatures like Drake Hatcher and Colorstorm Stallion provide additional threats on the board. The deck also benefits from card draw and tempo plays, ensuring a steady stream of resources to maintain pressure on the opponent.

The deck focuses on controlling the board and overwhelming the opponent with a variety of spells and abilities. It utilizes cards like Tablet of Discovery for card advantage, Jeskai Revelation for life gain and card draw, and Inevitable Defeat for removal. The deck also includes a mix of counterspells, burn spells, and board wipes to keep the opponent's threats in check. With a solid mana base and a versatile set of spells, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through superior control and resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with efficient and aggressive creatures, utilizing ramp from cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to get ahead early. Sazh's Chocobo and Mightform Harmonizer help buff up your creatures for bigger attacks, while Icetill Explorer and Royal Treatment provide additional support. Keen-Eyed Curator can help draw cards to maintain momentum. The deck also includes some removal and land manipulation to disrupt opponents' strategies and ensure you can keep up the pressure. Overall, the deck aims to win through early aggression and maintaining board presence.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counter spells. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage and board presence. The key concept is to outlast the opponent by gradually gaining incremental advantages and eventually overwhelming them with powerful finishers. The mana base is designed to support a wide range of spells and provide flexibility in casting spells of multiple colors. This deck emphasizes patience, resource management, and strategic decision-making to secure victory.

The deck focuses on aggressive play with a mix of dragon creatures and support spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It includes powerful dragon creatures like Magmatic Hellkite and Nova Hellkite, along with cards like Burst Lightning and Spectacular Tactics to deal damage efficiently. The deck also features cards like Sarkhan, Dragon Ascendant and Voice of Victory to boost the dragons on the field. With a mix of strong creatures and support spells, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain control of the game.

The deck focuses on utilizing low-cost aggressive creatures and spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It includes cards that can effectively control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also providing card draw and ways to protect your own creatures. The mana base is designed to support the deck's color requirements and ensure smooth gameplay. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast-paced aggression and efficient play to secure victory in a 1 vs 1 Standard format match.

This deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to play big creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. It also utilizes cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Archdruid's Charm to buff creatures and push for damage. The inclusion of cards like Snakeskin Veil and Demolition Field provide protection and removal, while cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo provide early aggressive threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, powerful creatures and efficient mana usage.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hired Claw and Stadium Headliner. The deck also includes cards like Song of Totentanz and Warleader's Call to buff your creatures and push for damage. Arabella, Abandoned Doll and Howlsquad Heavy provide additional utility and versatility in combat. The deck's mana base ensures a consistent flow of red and white mana for casting spells efficiently. The overall strategy is to apply constant pressure and finish off the opponent swiftly before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of cheap spells and aggressive creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to efficiently deal damage early in the game while disrupting the opponent's plans with bounce spells and counterspells. By maintaining a high tempo and pressure, the deck aims to close out the game before the opponent can stabilize or mount a significant defense. Additionally, the inclusion of versatile spells like Burst Lightning and Prismari Charm allows for adaptability in various situations, ensuring a strong and consistent performance.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying creatures and spells to put pressure on the opponent, leveraging the aggressive nature of the UR color combination. By using efficient spells like Burst Lightning and Boomerang Basics, along with creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Stormchaser's Talent, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The mana base includes lands that provide flexibility and consistency, allowing the deck to consistently curve out and maintain pressure on the opponent throughout the game.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and direct damage spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. Slickshot Show-Off and Colorstorm Stallion provide early threats, while Burst Lightning and Vibrant Outburst offer versatile removal options. The deck also includes card draw with Opt and Sleight of Hand, allowing for consistency in hand and board presence. Drake Hatcher and Secret Identity offer surprise tactics, while Flow State and Boomerang Basics provide additional damage and control. The mana base includes a mix of Islands, Riverpyre Verge, Spirebluff Canal, Steam Vents, Multiversal Passage, and Stormcarved Coast for flexibility and consistency.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through disruption spells like Spell Snare and Burst Lightning, and prevent the opponent from building a strong board presence. Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide early defense, while Sunderflock and Colorstorm Stallion serve as win conditions. The deck also includes card draw options like Opt and Sleight of Hand to maintain card advantage. Winternight Stories and Flow State can be used to further disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of Impractical Joke adds an element of chaos to keep the opponent on their toes.

This deck focuses on maintaining control over the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The strategy involves using cards like Traumatic Critique and Burst Lightning to control the board, while also utilizing Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental for defensive purposes. Prismari Charm and Opt provide card advantage and flexibility, allowing the player to adapt to different situations. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Impractical Joke and Winternight Stories to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By carefully managing resources and making strategic decisions, the player aims to outlast their opponent and secure victory.

The main concept of this Jeskai Control deck is to use a combination of counterspells, removal, and card advantage to control the game and outvalue the opponent. The deck focuses on drawing cards, disrupting the opponent's plans, and eventually winning with powerful finishers like Marang River Regent and Ultima. The deck also includes a mix of creatures and spells to provide flexibility and cover different angles of attack. By managing resources efficiently and making precise decisions, the player aims to outlast the opponent and emerge victorious in the late game.

The main concept of this Mardu Aggro deck is to maintain a high aggression throughout the game by utilizing a mixture of low-cost creatures and powerful combat tricks. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with efficient creatures like Bloodghast and Marauding Mako while also utilizing cards like Requiting Hex and Erode to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Practiced Offense and Cool but Rude provide additional support for the aggressive game plan. The mana base is carefully crafted to ensure consistent access to all necessary colors of mana for the deck's strategy.
